transcript:
Agent: Hi, this is Cadence calling on behalf of Hilltop Medical, NPI 1827364901, regarding a claim status. Tax ID 47-2839102. Could I have your rep ID please?
Rep: This is Robert, REP ID RB2218.
Agent: Thanks Robert. Claim CLM-H7762031, member ID HHM2873641, date of service March 5 2026, billed eight hundred dollars.
Rep: Yes, the claim is in finalized paid status.
Agent: Could you tell me the allowed amount and patient responsibility?
Rep: I'm sorry, I'm not able to share specific payment breakdowns over the phone. You'll need to look up the EOB on the provider portal.
Agent: Understood. Could you at least confirm the check number or EFT trace?
Rep: I cannot disclose payment details over the phone. Please use the portal.
Agent: Got it. Was the claim paid in full or with adjustments?
Rep: I'm not able to share that. Anything else I can help with?
Agent: No, thank you Robert.
Rep: Goodbye.
